$schema_note: Production Asset Bible manifest — companion to docs/asset-bible.md. type codes: A Realistic GLB/GLTF, B Procedural R3F geometry, C Instanced geometry, D PBR texture set, E HDRI/environment map, F Particle system, G Real image, H Video fallback, I Mobile fallback asset. decision: keep | improve | replace.

folderStructure.public/models/shared: Assets reused across ≥2 scenes: hero pellet, generic bag, generic pellet-bed unit cell
folderStructure.public/models/environment: Forest kit — trunk variants, foliage cards/clumps, HDRI-adjacent env props
folderStructure.public/models/machinery: Screening, grinding, drying, conditioning, pelletizing, cooling, QC rigs, conveyor modules
folderStructure.public/models/logistics: Truck, quay crane, bulk carrier, containers/hatch covers
folderStructure.public/textures/pellet: Compressed-pellet macro albedo/normal/roughness (shared: hero + bed instances)
folderStructure.public/textures/metal: Brushed steel, painted panel, galvanized, cast iron sets
folderStructure.public/videos: WebM/MP4 fallback loops (E in spec, H here)
folderStructure.public/fallbacks: Tier-0 static image/sprite substitutes for expensive live systems (I)

assets.name: Hero wood pellet (protagonist)
assets.scene: hero, pelletizing, cooling, qc, packaging, energy, circular
assets.currentImplementation: GLB (275KB) generated by scripts/generate-hero-pellet.mjs, camera-anchored, custom triplanar-ish wood shader (PELLET_VERT/FRAG). Over-scaled (fills 50-70% of frame) and reads as bread at current displacement.
assets.realismTarget: Ø6mm x 25-30mm compressed wood cylinder — tight radial striation, chamfered sheared ends, visible fiber pores, believable at both hero (3m) and QC macro scale
assets.geometryRequirements: Cylinder base, 4x current striation frequency, ±1.5% radial displacement (down from current), 2-3 tri-segment chamfer per end (no smooth cap), micro pore bump via vertex displacement not just shader
assets.requiredTextures: None (procedural shader) OR optional pellet/pellet_albedo+normal+rough 1K set for GPU cost reduction on tier-0
assets.materialRequirements: Keep custom ShaderMaterial; tighten specular (pow 38→90), add anisotropic-feel highlight along striation axis, uHeat/uGreen/uDissolve uniforms unchanged
assets.sourceStrategy: Regenerate via existing generate-hero-pellet.mjs script with revised displacement params; no external sourcing needed
assets.webOptimization: Draco + Meshopt (already small at 275KB); target <150KB after re-simplify
assets.mobileFallback: Same GLB, shader complexity unchanged (cheap fragment shader); skip dissolve edge glow on tier 0

assets.name: Hero pellet per-station staging (scale/offset)
assets.currentImplementation: Scale 1 at most stations, camera-space offset [0,0,-3], covers copy and machinery
assets.realismTarget: N/A — staging, not asset
assets.geometryRequirements: N/A
assets.materialRequirements: N/A
assets.sourceStrategy: Data-only change to STATIONS[].hero.scale/off values: 0.35-0.5 scale, offset into the third of frame opposite copy column
assets.mobileFallback: Same, drift disabled (quality.drift flag already exists)

assets.name: Studio/industrial HDRI environment map
assets.currentImplementation: None — zero environment map. All PBR metals/glass render flat/black (audit G2).
assets.realismTarget: Neutral overcast industrial studio HDRI giving metals believable specular response without introducing a visible skybox (fog hides background)
assets.geometryRequirements: N/A
assets.materialRequirements: Consumed via drei <Environment> or manual PMREMGenerator; per-material envMapIntensity 0.2-0.6 tuned per surface (steel 0.5, glass 0.6, painted panel 0.25)
assets.sourceStrategy: Source from Poly Haven (CC0) — e.g. 'industrial_sunset' or a neutral studio HDRI; crop/regrade to match ink/amber palette if needed
assets.webOptimization: PMREM computed once at load; store only the equirect source, not per-mip variants
assets.mobileFallback: Downsample to 512px equirect or reuse a baked cubemap; consider disabling on tier 0 (flat fallback color already acceptable there)
assets.estimatedPerformanceCost: One-time PMREM compute (~5-10ms), negligible per-frame cost

assets.name: Pine trunk variations (3-4 profiles)
assets.currentImplementation: Single tapered cylinder profile (14-segment), instanced 62x with vertex-color hue jitter; straight capped poles, no root flare, no bend
assets.realismTarget: Believable pine trunks with subtle lean/bend, root flare, bark ring detail at base — mixed at 3-4 profiles to break instancing repetition
assets.geometryRequirements: 3-segment taper with slight noise-driven bend (already partially done via rotation jitter — extend to a bent-cylinder lathe), root flare ring (wider base 15%), bark ridge displacement
assets.requiredTextures: textures/bark/bark_albedo.jpg, bark_normal.jpg, bark_ao.jpg (1K, tileable, triplanar Y-stretch)
assets.materialRequirements: MeshStandardMaterial + vertexColors (existing) + triplanar bark texture blended with existing HSL tint for variation
assets.sourceStrategy: Procedural v2 (lathe + noise bend) preferred over authored GLBs to keep zero-download budget; texture set sourced CC0 (Poly Haven 'bark_willow' or similar), downsized to 1K
assets.webOptimization: InstancedMesh unchanged; texture reused across all instances (single fetch)
assets.mobileFallback: Skip texture (vertex color only), keep bend geometry (cheap)
assets.estimatedPerformanceCost: Same instanced draw count; +1 texture fetch (~200KB)

assets.name: Canopy foliage clusters
assets.currentImplementation: ~186 instanced spheres per tree, uniform tone, floating disconnected from branch structure
assets.realismTarget: Foliage masses that read as attached to branches, not pasted blobs
assets.geometryRequirements: Cluster sphere placement along the existing branch instance directions (branches already computed — reuse their end-points as canopy anchors)
assets.materialRequirements: Existing canopyMat; tune emissiveIntensity to fall off with distance from ray planes
assets.sourceStrategy: Code-only change in Forest.tsx placement loop
assets.mobileFallback: Reduced count (already tiered: 34 vs 62 base)

assets.name: Leaf/needle silhouette cards
assets.currentImplementation: Instanced flat circles as 'leaf cards', vertex-colored, floating unattached mid-air
assets.realismTarget: Alpha-cutout needle/leaf sprites anchored near canopy clusters, not scattered in open air
assets.geometryRequirements: Keep instanced planes; swap circleGeometry for a needle-cluster alpha texture card
assets.requiredTextures: One small (512px) alpha-cutout needle-cluster PNG, tinted via vertex color at runtime
assets.materialRequirements: MeshStandardMaterial + alphaTest, vertexColors retained
assets.sourceStrategy: Author in a vector tool (2 mins) or generate via a simple canvas-drawn cluster — no external sourcing needed
assets.mobileFallback: Reduced count (90, already tiered)

assets.name: Forest floor ground plane
assets.filename: textures/concrete/... not applicable — needs textures/wood/forest_floor set
assets.currentImplementation: Flat MeshStandardMaterial circle, color #122016, no texture
assets.realismTarget: Needle-litter / moss ground read at grazing camera angles
assets.geometryRequirements: Keep circleGeometry; add subtle vertex displacement noise for unevenness
assets.requiredTextures: One tileable moss/needle-litter albedo+normal (1K), CC0 sourced
assets.materialRequirements: MeshStandardMaterial with texture + existing dark tint multiply
assets.sourceStrategy: Poly Haven 'forest_floor' or 'mossy_ground', downsized
assets.mobileFallback: Flat color only (skip texture fetch)

assets.name: God-ray shafts + spore particles
assets.currentImplementation: 4 static additive planes + shared particle program for spores; working well per audit (best-reviewed scene)
assets.realismTarget: Soft volumetric-feeling shafts with fresnel-style edge falloff instead of hard-edged quads
assets.geometryRequirements: N/A — shader tweak only
assets.materialRequirements: Add radial falloff to rayMat's alpha via a small custom shader replacing MeshBasicMaterial
assets.sourceStrategy: In-code shader tweak
assets.mobileFallback: 2 shafts or omit (tier 0)

assets.name: Raw wood logs (pile)
assets.currentImplementation: Instanced plain-color cylinder + flat orange disc end caps ('cartoon' per audit), assembly animation from scatter
assets.realismTarget: Recognizable cut logs with real bark texture and a genuine ring-pattern end grain
assets.geometryRequirements: Keep instanced cylinder + cap; add bark displacement via triplanar noise (onBeforeCompile) matching forest bark
assets.requiredTextures: Reuse forest bark set; new procedural-canvas or small authored ring-texture PNG (512px, tileable radial rings) for end caps
assets.materialRequirements: Bark MeshStandardMaterial shared with forest trunks; end-cap material samples ring texture with per-instance UV rotation for variety
assets.sourceStrategy: Ring texture: generate via HTML canvas at build time (near-free) or one authored PNG; bark shared with forest asset
assets.webOptimization: Shares bark texture fetch with Forest scene (already loaded by the time Collection is reached)
assets.mobileFallback: Flat color only, keep instanced geometry
assets.estimatedPerformanceCost: No new draw calls, 1 shared texture

assets.name: Sawmill offcuts
assets.currentImplementation: Not implemented as a distinct asset — offcuts are implied only by Shavings/Chips
assets.realismTarget: Irregular board offcuts (flat rectangular slabs with angled cut ends) distinct from round logs, adding raw-material variety at the pile edge
assets.geometryRequirements: Instanced boxGeometry with one beveled/angled end (simple shear via vertex offset), 8-12 instances
assets.requiredTextures: Reuse wood/woodEnd tone material, no new texture required
assets.materialRequirements: M.woodEnd variant, slightly greyer/weathered tint
assets.sourceStrategy: New small component in kit/biomass.tsx, no external asset
assets.mobileFallback: 6 instances or omit

assets.name: Wood chips
assets.currentImplementation: Instanced tetrahedra, 2-tone HSL jitter, functionally fine but visually generic close-up
assets.decision: keep (procedural is correct at this scale)
assets.realismTarget: Angular chip silhouette — current tetrahedron reads acceptably at screen distance in these two scenes
assets.geometryRequirements: No change needed; optionally mix in a second low-poly shard shape for variety
assets.materialRequirements: M.chip unchanged
assets.sourceStrategy: N/A
assets.mobileFallback: 70 instances (already tiered)

assets.name: Sawdust (particulate)
assets.currentImplementation: Shared particle program, soft-disc sprite only — reads as orange bokeh rather than falling material (audit G5)
assets.realismTarget: Small irregular solid-looking specks with tighter edge falloff and NormalBlending (not additive) for the dense bursts
assets.geometryRequirements: N/A — fragment shader change only
assets.materialRequirements: Tighten smoothstep edge in PARTICLE_FRAG for a 'solid' sprite variant selected by a uSolid uniform or vSeed threshold
assets.sourceStrategy: Shader edit in fx/shaders.ts, applied site-wide
assets.mobileFallback: 25% count (already tiered via quality.particleScale)

assets.name: Wood shavings (helix ribbons)
assets.currentImplementation: TubeGeometry helix curves, placed randomly on ground with no anchoring to the pile
assets.realismTarget: A few shavings resting against/near the log pile base, not scattered on empty ground
assets.geometryRequirements: No geometry change; reposition relative to Logs pile bounds, reduce count 9→5
assets.materialRequirements: M.woodEnd unchanged
assets.sourceStrategy: Placement-only code change
assets.mobileFallback: 2 or omit

assets.name: Vibrating screen deck
assets.currentImplementation: Inclined slotted box primitive, floats with no supporting hall/floor context, slats read as flat piano keys
assets.realismTarget: Recognizable vibrating screen with beveled deck edges, visible mesh weave on the screening surface, motor/spring mounts already present
assets.geometryRequirements: Bevel deck box edges (RoundedBoxGeometry or chamfer), replace flat slat bars with a shader-driven mesh-grid pattern on the deck surface
assets.requiredTextures: Optional: metal/wire_mesh_alpha.png for the screening surface (512px, tiled, alpha-cut)
assets.materialRequirements: M.steel + envmap (from studio-hdri); mesh surface via alphaTest texture or procedural stripe shader
assets.sourceStrategy: Geometry/shader edit; optional small authored mesh-alpha PNG
assets.mobileFallback: Flat shaded slats (skip mesh texture)

assets.name: Industrial grinder / hammer mill
assets.currentImplementation: Recently upgraded kit-of-parts: housing, painted frame, bolt ring, hammer drum, hopper, motor/belt, duct, skid, rails — the most detailed machine on the site already
assets.realismTarget: Production-line hammer mill; interior drum cavity should read as illuminated machinery, not a dark blob inside a lit panel
assets.geometryRequirements: Add flange ring + bolt detail to hopper mouth; merge bolt meshes into one InstancedMesh
assets.requiredTextures: metal/painted_steel_albedo+normal (1K) for the housing/panel once envmap is live
assets.materialRequirements: Add small warm point light inside drum cavity; envMapIntensity on M.steel/M.accentBlue
assets.sourceStrategy: Continue procedural improvement; only commission a GLB if budget allows a true 'flagship machine' upgrade — not required for P0/P1 outcomes
assets.mobileFallback: Skip cavity light, keep geometry

assets.name: Rotary dryer drum
assets.currentImplementation: 14m ribbed cylinder, riding rings, inlet emissive glow disc — reads as a polished gold/brass pipe due to no envmap + high metalness + warm key (audit finding)
assets.realismTarget: Weathered galvanized-steel rotary dryer shell with visible panel seams so rotation is perceptible, believable heat glow at the inlet
assets.geometryRequirements: Add subtle longitudinal panel-seam geometry or shader stripes; keep existing rib/support geometry
assets.materialRequirements: Desaturate current M.steel instance for this drum; envMapIntensity ~0.4; inlet uses an animated ember-noise emissive shader instead of flat disc
assets.sourceStrategy: CC0 galvanized steel set (Poly Haven), 1K
assets.mobileFallback: Flat tinted material, static inlet glow (no shader)

assets.name: Conditioner vessel
assets.currentImplementation: Featureless black dome + base + paddle shaft spinning above a sealed vessel (mechanically nonsensical) + 4 nozzles — reads as a void bell (audit worst-detail machine)
assets.realismTarget: Pressure vessel with visible seams, man-way hatch, ladder, gauge cluster, sight-glass revealing interior paddle motion
assets.geometryRequirements: Vertical weld-seam ridges (torus rings or displaced bands), bolted hatch disc, ladder (repeated rung instances), small gauge cylinder cluster; move paddle shaft inside behind a sight-glass window
assets.materialRequirements: Brushed-band shader or texture; sight-glass = small transmission/emissive disc showing interior warm light
assets.sourceStrategy: Geometry additions in-code; texture CC0 sourced
assets.webOptimization: Single 1K texture reused from metal set
assets.desktopVersion: Full detail incl. sight-glass interior light
assets.mobileFallback: Omit sight-glass interior light, keep geometry

assets.name: Pellet mill ring die + rollers
assets.currentImplementation: Torus + 26 emissive cylinder 'bores' sticking out of the ring face + 2 hidden roller cylinders + radial strand instances — reads as a glossy donut, the flagship scene is currently unreadable due to hero-pellet occlusion (G1) and the die geometry not resembling a real die face
assets.realismTarget: This is the single highest-value asset investment on the site — a true annular die face (flat ring with a real bore-hole array), visible roller pair pressing into it, extrusion strands emerging from bore holes
assets.geometryRequirements: Flat annular disc (ring with inner+outer radius) with instanced cylindrical bore holes cut via boolean or faked via inset instanced dark cylinders flush with the face; two roller drums visible pressing against the face, not hidden inside the torus tube
assets.materialRequirements: Anisotropic-feel radial brush shader/texture on the face; emissive ember tint only at bore rims (not full cylinder length)
assets.sourceStrategy: PREFERRED: commission or source a low-poly (~3-5K tri) ring-die GLB from a 3D marketplace (CGTrader/Sketchfab, CC or licensed) OR model in Blender in ~2-3 hours; FALLBACK: procedural v2 lathe-built annulus with instanced bore insets (no external sourcing, more engineering time)
assets.mobileFallback: Simplified LOD (fewer bore instances, flat shading) or the procedural fallback
assets.estimatedPerformanceCost: Low-moderate (one extra draw call vs. current torus)

assets.name: Extrusion strands (die → pellet birth)
assets.currentImplementation: 22 instanced cylinders scaling radially from the die rim, currently invisible behind the hero pellet occlusion
assets.decision: keep (blocked by staging fix, not the asset)
assets.realismTarget: Visible strand emergence timed to die rotation, breaking into falling pellets
assets.geometryRequirements: No change once die geometry (pellet-mill-die) provides a real face to emerge from
assets.materialRequirements: M.pellet, lighter/fresher tone than cured pellets downstream
assets.sourceStrategy: N/A
assets.mobileFallback: 12 strands

assets.name: Counterflow cooler + pellet bed
assets.currentImplementation: Discharge grid + 3000-instance PelletBed + MeshPhysicalMaterial glass box + posts/plenum + warm/cool crossfade lights positioned outside the glass — bed reads as grey gravel in a dark aquarium (audit finding)
assets.realismTarget: A visibly warm-to-cool pellet mass settling in an open-frame or thin-glass cooler, product color/vibrancy readable through the enclosure
assets.geometryRequirements: Simplify glass box to a single thin front pane (or remove transmission look entirely for an open-frame cooler) — more realistic for this equipment type and solves the muddy-glass problem
assets.requiredTextures: None (procedural pellet shader ideally reused from hero-pellet-v2)
assets.materialRequirements: Move warm/cool point lights inside the bin above the bed; brighten PelletBed instance HSL lightness range (0.3-0.48 → 0.38-0.56); apply hero-pellet's striation micro-shader to bed instances at low cost via a simplified variant
assets.sourceStrategy: Code-only changes, no new assets
assets.webOptimization: Instance count already tiered (3000/1500/700 by quality.pelletCount)
assets.mobileFallback: 700 instances, opaque walls (already speced: fallback opaque tier 0)
assets.estimatedPerformanceCost: Moderate (largest instance count on the site) — simplification reduces GPU cost vs. current transmission material

assets.name: Conveyor system (shared module)
assets.currentImplementation: Parameterized rails/rollers/scrolling-belt-shader module reused 4-5x; reads as a flat black band with subtle cleat pattern — functionally solid, visually anonymous
assets.realismTarget: Recognizable rubber conveyor belt with worn/dusty variation reading differently per scene (clean near QC, dusty near grinding)
assets.geometryRequirements: No structural change; add slight sag/catenary curve between rollers for realism
assets.requiredTextures: None (shader-driven cleat pattern already works, can add per-instance dust-tint uniform)
assets.materialRequirements: Add a uGrime uniform to BELT_FRAG, driven per-instance by scene (0 near packaging/QC, higher near grinding)
assets.sourceStrategy: Shader parameter addition, no new asset
assets.mobileFallback: Static grime value, same shader (cheap already)

assets.name: Jumbo (FIBC) bag
assets.currentImplementation: Displaced BoxGeometry with sine-wave bulge + torus strap loops, scaled on Y to simulate filling — reads as 'white paper cube with black croissant handles', the least convincing asset on the site per audit
assets.realismTarget: Recognizable 1-tonne bulk bag: cinched/rounded shoulders, visible woven-poly weave with sheen, 4 lifting loops as real extruded straps, optional printed branding, believable fill morph (not uniform Y-scale crush)
assets.geometryRequirements: Rounded-shoulder lathe or sculpted low-poly form (~800-1500 tris), separate strap-loop meshes (extruded ribbon, not torus), 2 morph targets (empty/slack ↔ full) for the filling animation
assets.requiredTextures: fabric/fibc_weave_albedo+normal+ao (1K, tileable cross-hatch weave) + optional printed-label decal (512px, alpha)
assets.materialRequirements: MeshStandardMaterial, roughness ~0.75, subtle sheen response via envMapIntensity 0.15-0.25, weave normal for cloth-like light catch
assets.sourceStrategy: PREFERRED: source a low-poly FIBC bag model from CGTrader/Sketchfab (many CC0/low-cost options exist) or commission ~1-2hr Blender model; weave texture from Poly Haven 'fabric' category, tinted; FALLBACK: procedural v2 lathe rebuild with strap ribbons + weave shader (no morph, scale-based fill kept as interim)
assets.webOptimization: Draco + Meshopt, target ≤120KB; single texture set shared across every bag instance
assets.desktopVersion: Full morph-target fill animation + weave material
assets.mobileFallback: Static full-bag mesh only (no morph), flat tinted material (skip weave texture)
assets.estimatedPerformanceCost: Low per-instance once instanced in Warehouse; moderate if many unique morph-target bags render simultaneously in Packaging (only 1 filling + 3 finished — acceptable)

assets.name: Bag filling station (gantry + spout)
assets.currentImplementation: Two upright posts + header beam + funnel spout primitive — functionally clear, visually generic
assets.realismTarget: Recognizable bag-filling gantry with a load cell / clamp frame gripping the bag neck
assets.geometryRequirements: Add a clamp-ring detail around the spout base gripping the bag's fill spout; add small control panel box on one post
assets.materialRequirements: M.steel + envmap
assets.sourceStrategy: Geometry addition, no new asset
assets.mobileFallback: Simplified (current version)

assets.name: Wood pallets
assets.currentImplementation: Not implemented — jumbo bags currently sit directly on the floor/conveyor with no pallet beneath them, breaking real-world logistics logic
assets.realismTarget: Standard EUR/industrial pallet (9-block or 3-runner) beneath every staged/stacked bag
assets.geometryRequirements: Instanced low-poly pallet (deck boards + 3 runners + blocks, ~200-400 tris), reused under every bag instance in Warehouse and the finished-bag row in Packaging
assets.requiredTextures: Reuse wood/woodEnd tone material, no new texture required
assets.materialRequirements: M.woodEnd or a dedicated weathered-pallet-wood tint
assets.sourceStrategy: Model once procedurally in kit/machines.tsx; no external sourcing needed
assets.webOptimization: InstancedMesh, one geometry reused everywhere pallets appear
assets.desktopVersion: Full instanced count matching bag count
assets.mobileFallback: Same (cheap geometry, keep at all tiers)

assets.name: Industrial racking system
assets.currentImplementation: Instanced upright frames + shelf beams, functionally reads as racking but lacks cross-bracing and beam-end connectors
assets.realismTarget: Recognizable pallet racking (upright frames, horizontal beams, diagonal cross-bracing, beam-end safety clips)
assets.geometryRequirements: Add instanced diagonal cross-brace bars between uprights; add small beam-end connector blocks
assets.materialRequirements: M.steel + envMapIntensity ~0.35
assets.sourceStrategy: Geometry addition in existing instancing loop
assets.mobileFallback: Skip cross-braces (uprights+beams only)

assets.name: Racked/stacked bag stock
assets.currentImplementation: Instanced plain BoxGeometry standing in for bags on racks — reads as cardboard cartons, the clearest 'placeholder' moment in the site per audit
assets.realismTarget: Recognizable FIBC bags with natural slump/settle, racked in believable rows
assets.geometryRequirements: Reuse the jumbo-bag geometry (simplified/low-poly LOD, no morph targets needed since these are static) via InstancedMesh
assets.materialRequirements: Same weave material as jumbo-bag asset, instanced
assets.sourceStrategy: Depends on jumbo-bag asset delivery; reuse its LOD1 mesh
assets.webOptimization: One InstancedMesh, shared texture with foreground bags
assets.mobileFallback: Reduced count or reduced LOD (box fallback acceptable at tier 0 distance)

assets.name: Warehouse practical light fixtures
assets.currentImplementation: Emissive strip meshes with no matching light source and no housing — reads as glowing stickers, hall has no walls/roof so blackness swallows the space
assets.realismTarget: Believable high-bay LED fixtures casting real illumination pools down the aisle, hall envelope (walls/roof) closing the volume
assets.geometryRequirements: Add simple housing box around each emissive strip; add instanced wall/roof planes closing the hall
assets.materialRequirements: Pair each strip with a small point/spot light (already have one shared pointLight — add 2-3 more matched to strip positions)
assets.sourceStrategy: Geometry + light additions, no new external assets
assets.webOptimization: A few extra lights — monitor draw/light budget on tier 0 (consider baked-emissive-only, no real light, at tier 0)
assets.mobileFallback: Emissive-only strips, no real lights (current tier-0 behavior)
assets.estimatedPerformanceCost: Low-moderate (each real-time light adds shader cost)

assets.name: Flatbed / delivery truck
assets.currentImplementation: Stylized box-and-cylinder silhouette with emissive running lights, shared between Collection and Logistics; acceptable at distance, generic up close
assets.realismTarget: Recognizable flatbed/curtainside truck silhouette, convincing at both the closer Collection framing and the quay-side Logistics framing
assets.geometryRequirements: Add cab window glass panel, mirror stubs, wheel-well arches; if sourcing a GLB, target ~5-8K tris low-poly
assets.requiredTextures: metal/painted_cab (reuse existing kit materials) — GLB path may need its own small 1K set
assets.materialRequirements: M.housing/M.steel/M.dark reused if procedural; envMapIntensity once HDRI lands
assets.sourceStrategy: PREFERRED: low-poly truck GLB from Sketchfab/CGTrader (CC0 or licensed, many exist for ~$0-30); FALLBACK: continue procedural kit additions
assets.mobileFallback: Procedural silhouette (current version) as the tier-0 LOD regardless of desktop asset choice

assets.name: Port/quay environment (crane, quay, lighting)
assets.currentImplementation: Concrete quay slab + single box-frame crane silhouette + truck; scene is ~90% black per audit (worst-performing scene), no motivated light sources beyond one distant point light
assets.realismTarget: A legible night port: quay lit by sodium/LED practicals, crane with warning lights, visible horizon where sea meets sky
assets.geometryRequirements: Add quay-edge bollards (instanced), string of practical light poles along the quay, horizon gradient plane behind the ship
assets.materialRequirements: Multiple small emissive-capped pole lights + matching point lights; crane gets 2 warning-light emissive tips
assets.sourceStrategy: Geometry/lighting additions in-code, no external asset required
assets.webOptimization: A handful of small lights — budget against tier-0 light count cap
assets.mobileFallback: Emissive-only pole caps, no real lights beyond the existing shared key
assets.estimatedPerformanceCost: Moderate (currently the most light-starved scene, needs 3-5 new practicals)

assets.name: Bulk carrier / cargo ship
assets.filename: models/logistics/bulk-carrier.glb (recommended) — current: procedural hull boxes + instanced containers
assets.currentImplementation: Box-lathe hull + bridge tower + instanced container stacks (steel material, unreadable without envmap at night) — containers are also the wrong cargo type for a pellet bulk carrier
assets.realismTarget: A recognizable bulk/handysize carrier silhouette with hatch covers (not containers — pellets ship as bulk cargo under hatches), bridge superstructure with lit windows, deck crane
assets.geometryRequirements: Replace container stacks with instanced raised hatch-cover panels (simple beveled boxes) + 1-2 deck cranes (boom + mast, reusing quay-crane kit parts); keep hull/bridge silhouette, refine bow/stern taper
assets.requiredTextures: metal/hull_painted (1K, matte with waterline stripe achievable via a simple gradient shader instead of a texture)
assets.materialRequirements: Hull matte MeshStandardMaterial, bridge windows emissive (warm), envMapIntensity low (0.15) since hulls are matte not glossy
assets.sourceStrategy: PREFERRED: low-poly bulk-carrier GLB from Sketchfab/CGTrader; FALLBACK: procedural v2 with hatch-cover instancing replacing containers (moderate code effort, no external cost)
assets.desktopVersion: Full detail + lit windows + deck crane
assets.mobileFallback: Simplified hull-only silhouette, no crane

assets.name: Great-circle shipping route arcs
assets.currentImplementation: QuadraticBezierCurve3 tube geometry + dash shader; visible kink artifact at the control-point apex at shallow angles
assets.realismTarget: Smooth great-circle-reading arcs with no visible geometric kink
assets.geometryRequirements: Replace QuadraticBezierCurve3 with a 3-4 point CatmullRomCurve3 or true spherical-arc sampling for a smooth apex
assets.materialRequirements: Existing DASH shader unchanged
assets.sourceStrategy: Code-only geometry fix
assets.mobileFallback: 1-2 arcs

assets.name: Industrial boiler / furnace
assets.currentImplementation: Boiler housing box (unlit black wall) + flat emissive circle 'furnace eye' behind a torus ring + stack + pipe rack — reads as 'a glowing ball behind a chocolate torus, not a boiler' per audit; the climax scene currently undersells itself
assets.realismTarget: A framed furnace aperture with visible depth/fire interior, boiler face reading as riveted/paneled cast-iron machinery lit by its own fire
assets.geometryRequirements: Recess the furnace opening into the boiler face (inset ring + shadow gap) rather than a flush disc; add rivet-field/panel-seam instances to the boiler housing face; keep stack/pipes
assets.materialRequirements: Replace flat emissive circle with a layered fbm-noise 'fire bed' shader (reuse NOISE glsl already in shaders.ts) for interior depth; boiler face gets envMapIntensity ~0.2 (matte, sooted)
assets.sourceStrategy: Shader + geometry work in-code; texture CC0 sourced (Poly Haven 'cast_iron' or similar), 1K
assets.webOptimization: One new fragment shader (cheap), one 1K texture (~300KB)
assets.mobileFallback: Flat emissive color (current version) instead of fire-bed shader; textureless tint
assets.estimatedPerformanceCost: Low (fullscreen-quad-scale shader on one small disc, not expensive)

assets.name: Ember rise particles (directional)
assets.currentImplementation: Single particle system spawning evenly across the whole frame — reads as confetti rather than embers escaping a specific aperture
assets.realismTarget: Two-layer ember system (sparse large near / dense small far) both originating from the furnace aperture, with directional rise
assets.geometryRequirements: N/A — split existing single ParticleField call into 2 calls with tighter spawn area centered on the (now recessed) furnace opening
assets.materialRequirements: Existing PARTICLE shader, no changes needed
assets.sourceStrategy: Parameter/placement change only
assets.mobileFallback: 1 system (25% count)

assets.name: Stack plume particles
assets.currentImplementation: Spawns at y≈17, far outside the typically framed camera area — wasted particle budget
assets.realismTarget: Visible clean-combustion plume within the actual framed shot
assets.geometryRequirements: N/A — reposition spawn center/area to match actual camera framing at this station's dwell
assets.materialRequirements: Unchanged
assets.sourceStrategy: Placement-only fix, verify against CameraRig focus point
assets.mobileFallback: 25% count

assets.name: Particle sprite shape variety (shard/capsule/puff)
assets.currentImplementation: Single soft-disc sprite for every particle use (dust, chips, sawdust, steam, sparks, embers, leaves) — solids read as bokeh balls rather than falling matter (audit G5, the most repeated finding)
assets.realismTarget: 2-3 selectable sprite silhouettes (sharp angular shard, elongated capsule, soft puff) chosen per-particle via existing vSeed attribute, so falling solids read as matter and only gas/light effects (steam, glow) stay soft
assets.geometryRequirements: N/A — fragment shader branch only, no new geometry or textures
assets.materialRequirements: Extend PARTICLE_FRAG with a shape-select branch; keep AdditiveBlending for gas/light uses, NormalBlending already used for solid rains
assets.sourceStrategy: Single shared shader edit, propagates to every station automatically
assets.webOptimization: No cost change — same draw call structure
assets.mobileFallback: Same (shader cost is negligible either way)

assets.name: Shared rounded/beveled primitive helper
assets.currentImplementation: All kit machinery uses raw BoxGeometry with hard unbeveled edges — flat, doesn't catch rim light, reads as CAD/prototype rather than manufactured metal
assets.realismTarget: Every visible machine panel/housing edge has a small bevel/chamfer that catches light
assets.geometryRequirements: One shared bevelBox(w,h,d,radius) helper using RoundedBoxGeometry (already available via three/examples or a small custom chamfer), radius ~0.02-0.04
assets.materialRequirements: N/A — geometry only, works with existing kit materials
assets.sourceStrategy: One-time helper function, then swap boxGeometry calls across kit/machines.tsx and station files incrementally
assets.webOptimization: Slightly higher vertex count per box (negligible at this asset count)
assets.mobileFallback: Same geometry (cost is trivial) or fall back to sharp boxes only if a tier-0 vertex budget is ever hit

source_externally_or_model_professionall: pellet-mill-die (flagship asset — highest ROI for commissioning)
bulk-carrier (optional — procedural v2 with hatch-cover fix is a viable no-cost alternative)
